action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 completed a 10-epoch DDP training run in ~62 minutes. Best validation mIoU improved to 0.4938, up from 0.3987 at 2 epochs. Training stdout shows steady convergence. We have ~8.5 hours and 20 iterations remaining. Analysis: The model is still undertrained; ADE20K benefits from 40–80 epochs. Before scheduling longer runs, I need the official test mIoU of the current best checkpoint to confirm the validation trend transfers to the hidden test labels. Decision: Submit eval for checkpoints/best.pt immediately. Once the score is confirmed, the next steps will be to (1) scale training to 30–50 total epochs with cosine LR and (2) add multi-scale TTA in predict.py.
